U
Oracle Events
- Search for Canopy Health emails using search_emails (query: "Canopy Health" or "Mehta" or "Patricia Langford") to find Patricia Langford's executive relocation request for Dr. Anand Mehta (CMO, Boston to Chicago), Mina's response committing to white-glove service, and Patricia's follow-up with Dr. Mehta's contact details.
- Search CRM deals for Canopy Health using crm_search_deals (company_id: "company_canopy" or dealname: "Canopy") to find all active deals: Dr. Mehta executive relocation ($12,170, in progress), Q2 relocations ($10,000, contract sent), Kovacs ($3,850, in progress), Webb ($3,200, in progress), and Okonkwo ($2,160, in progress).
- Search Airtable Relocations using airtable_search_records or airtable_list_records (table_name: "Relocations", filtered by Company: "Canopy Health") to find all active Canopy moves including Rachel Dominguez (LA to Portland), Kevin Okafor (Phoenix to Portland), Dr. Renata Kovacs (Nashville to Toronto), Marcus Webb (Detroit to Chicago), and Tyler Okonkwo (Philadelphia to Denver).
- Search Slack messages using conversations_search_messages (search_query: "Mehta" or "Fatimah" or "Canopy") to find Fatimah Al-Rashidi's consolidated status update on the Dr. Mehta relocation covering three workstreams: temporary housing (awaiting Dr. Mehta's selection), equipment packing with chain-of-custody (blocker: needs template from Canopy compliance), and household move (pending, Swift Relocations for April 28-30 pack date).
- Search Linear issues using linear_list_issues (query: "Canopy" or "Mehta") to find Canopy relocation tracking tickets: Dr. Mehta household move (#396, in progress, Fatimah), Dr. Mehta temporary housing (#343, in progress, Fatimah), Dr. Mehta equipment packing & chain-of-custody (#375, in progress, Fatimah), Lily Marchetti tasks (#304-306, Blessing), and Dr. Yusuf Abdi tasks (#301-303, completed).
- Search QuickBooks invoices using quickbooks_search_invoices (criteria referencing "Canopy") to find outstanding invoices: Dr. Abdi invoice ($5,047, unpaid), Q2 wave invoice INV-2026-0401 ($9,210 with $2,650 in pending surcharge approvals — Kovacs $850, Webb $1,200, Okonkwo $600), Portland relocations ($10,000), and Dr. Mehta estimate EST-2026-0422 ($12,170).
- Search Linear issues for individual Canopy Q2 moves using linear_list_issues (query: "Kovacs" or "Okonkwo" or "Marcus Webb" or "Lily Marchetti") to find the status of each active relocation and identify any that are overdue, cancelled, or missing tracking.
- Search for BrightLoop emails using search_emails (query: "Tessa Moreno" or "BrightLoop") to discover unread emails from Tessa about Simone Richter's rush relocation (lease ends April 6), Marcus Webb's vehicle shipping request and approval ($1,100 via Road Runner Auto Transport, must arrive by April 20), and earlier correspondence about Jordan Ekwueme.
- Search CRM deals for BrightLoop using crm_search_deals (company_id: "company_brightloop" or dealname: "BrightLoop") to find the Jordan Ekwueme first relocation deal ($7,000, qualified to buy) and the April 2026 Richter + Webb deal ($11,350, closed won).
- Search Airtable Relocations for BrightLoop using airtable_search_records or airtable_list_records (table_name: "Relocations", filtered by Company: "BrightLoop Analytics") to find BrightLoop moves: Simone Richter (Chicago to Boston, rush, in progress), Marcus Webb (Atlanta to Boston, vehicle shipping, in progress), Jordan Whitfield (Minneapolis to Denver, in progress), Preethi Nair (Atlanta to Raleigh, in progress), and Jordan Ekwueme (San Diego to Boston, completed).
- Search Linear issues using linear_list_issues (query: "BrightLoop" or "Ekwueme") to find Jordan Ekwueme's apartment search (#322, in progress, Suki Patel), flight booking (#323, to do), and moving coordination (#324, to do).
- Search Slack messages using conversations_search_messages (search_query: "BrightLoop" or "Simone Richter") to find operational updates on the rush move and David's strategic notes about BrightLoop as a growth account.
- Search QuickBooks invoices for BrightLoop using quickbooks_search_invoices (criteria referencing "BrightLoop") to find INV-2026-0305 ($10,000 for Whitfield + Nair, due April 23) and INV-2026-0308 ($11,350 for Richter + Webb, due May 2).
- Search sent emails using search_emails (query: "Tessa Moreno", folder_name: "SENT") to understand what Mina has already communicated to Tessa and identify gaps in responses to the unread emails.
- Send a Slack message to Fatimah Al-Rashidi using conversations_add_message (channel_id for #operations or the Mehta thread) checking on the Dr. Mehta relocation timeline — specifically asking about the temporary housing selection status, the chain-of-custody template blocker, and Swift Relocations engagement for the April 28-30 pack date.
- Send an email to Tessa Moreno using send_email (sender: "mina.hashimoto@moveops.com", recipient: "tessa.moreno@brightloopanalytics.com") with a consolidated status update covering all active BrightLoop relocations (Simone Richter, Marcus Webb, Jordan Ekwueme, Jordan Whitfield, Preethi Nair), confirming the vehicle shipping approval, and noting the invoice details.

📋 Rubrics
Rubric Results
✓ Pass ✗ Fail Click any row to expand justifications
# Criterion Run #1Run #2Run #3Run #4Run #5Run #6 Pass Rate
1 The model must use an email search tool (e.g., search_emails or list_emails) to search for BrightLoop and Canopy Health emails.
tool selection
 ✓✓✓✓✓✓ 100%
✓Run #1The agent called search_emails multiple times: with query 'Tessa Moreno', 'Canopy Health', 'BrightLoop', and 'Mehta invoice'. These calls successfully retrieved email data for both accounts.
✓Run #2The agent called search_emails multiple times with queries including 'Canopy Health', 'Tessa Moreno', 'Mehta', 'BrightLoop', 'invoice', 'approval', 'INV-2026', and 'Simone Richter'.
✓Run #3The agent called search_emails multiple times with queries 'Canopy Health', 'BrightLoop', 'Tessa Moreno', 'Mehta', 'Fatimah', 'invoice', 'approval', 'Road Runner', and 'Simone Richter'. Email search tools were clearly used to investigate both accounts.
✓Run #4The agent called mcp__mcp_d4e7cf9a__search_emails multiple times with queries 'Canopy Health', 'Tessa Moreno', 'BrightLoop', 'Mehta', 'invoice', and 'approval'. Email search tools were clearly used to find relevant account data.
✓Run #5The agent called search_emails multiple times: with query 'Canopy Health', 'Tessa Moreno', 'Mehta', 'Simone Richter', 'vehicle shipping Road Runner', and again with folder_name='SENT'. These calls successfully returned relevant email data, including 3 unread emails from Tessa Moreno.
✓Run #6The agent called search_emails multiple times with queries 'Canopy Health', 'BrightLoop', 'Tessa Moreno', 'Mehta', 'Fatimah', 'invoice', and 'approval', directly satisfying the requirement to search for relevant emails.
2 The model must use a Slack search tool (e.g., conversations_search_messages or conversations_history) to search for messages related to Dr. Mehta or Canopy Health.
tool selection
 ✓✓✓✓✓✓ 100%
✓Run #1The agent called conversations_search_messages with search_query 'Mehta' and filter_users_from '@Fatimah', and separately with 'Canopy Health'. The first returned Fatimah's detailed consolidated status update.
✓Run #2The agent called conversations_search_messages with queries 'Mehta', 'Fatimah', 'Canopy Health', and 'Fatimah Mehta chain-of-custody'. The 'Mehta' search returned Fatimah's consolidated status update.
✓Run #3The agent called conversations_search_messages with queries 'Mehta', 'Canopy Health', 'Fatimah', and 'BrightLoop'. The Mehta query returned Fatimah's consolidated status update (confirmed in tool_call_result_6.json).
✓Run #4The agent called mcp__mcp_d4e7cf9a__conversations_search_messages with queries 'Mehta', 'Fatimah', 'Canopy Health', and 'BrightLoop'. The Mehta query returned Fatimah's consolidated status update as shown in tool_call_result_6.json.
✓Run #5The agent called conversations_search_messages with search_query='Mehta', 'Fatimah', 'Canopy', 'BrightLoop', and 'Fatimah Mehta timeline'. The search for 'Mehta' returned Fatimah's detailed consolidated Slack update covering all three workstreams.
✓Run #6The agent called conversations_search_messages with search_query values 'Mehta', 'Fatimah', 'Canopy Health', and 'BrightLoop', satisfying the requirement to search Slack for Fatimah's Mehta updates.
3 The model must use a CRM tool (e.g., crm_search_deals, crm_search_companies, or crm_get_deal) to look up account and deal data for Canopy Health and BrightLoop Analytics.
tool selection
 ✓✓✓✗✓✓ 83%
✓Run #1The agent called crm_search_companies for both 'Canopy Health' and 'BrightLoop', successfully retrieving company records for both accounts.
✓Run #2The agent called crm_search_companies for both 'Canopy Health' and 'BrightLoop', and crm_search_deals for both company IDs.
✓Run #3The agent called crm_search_companies for both 'Canopy Health' and 'BrightLoop Analytics', receiving company records for both. CRM data was retrieved from the trajectory.
✗Run #4No CRM tool calls (crm_search_deals, crm_search_companies, crm_get_deal, or similar) appear anywhere in the trajectory. The agent relied solely on email, Slack, and Linear without querying the CRM for account/deal data.
✓Run #5The agent called crm_search_companies with name='Canopy Health' and name='BrightLoop' in parallel. Both calls returned valid company records from the CRM system.
✓Run #6The agent called crm_search_companies for both 'Canopy Health' and 'BrightLoop', which is one of the acceptable CRM tools listed in the criterion (crm_search_deals, crm_search_companies, or crm_get_deal).
4 The model must use an Airtable tool (e.g., airtable_search_records or airtable_list_records) to find active relocation records.
tool selection
 ✗✓✗✗✗✗ 17%
✗Run #1No Airtable tool calls (airtable_search_records or airtable_list_records) appear anywhere in the trajectory. The agent did not query Airtable for active relocation records.
✓Run #2The agent called airtable_list_bases, airtable_list_tables, and airtable_search_records for both 'Canopy Health' and 'BrightLoop' in the Relocations table.
✗Run #3No airtable_search_records or airtable_list_records tool calls appear anywhere in the trajectory. The agent did not query Airtable for relocation records.
✗Run #4No Airtable tool calls (airtable_search_records, airtable_list_records, or similar) appear anywhere in the trajectory. The agent did not query the Airtable Relocations table for active move records.
✗Run #5No Airtable tool was called at any point in the trajectory. The agent relied on CRM, Linear, Slack, Email, and QuickBooks but never queried the Airtable Relocations table, which is the source of truth for active move records.
✗Run #6No Airtable tool calls (airtable_search_records or airtable_list_records) appear anywhere in the trajectory. The agent skipped querying Airtable entirely.
5 The model must use a Linear tool (e.g., linear_list_issues or linear_get_issue) to find relocation tracking tickets and status updates.
tool selection
 ✓✗✓✓✓✓ 83%
✓Run #1The agent called linear_list_issues multiple times with queries for 'Canopy', 'BrightLoop', 'Mehta', 'Simone Richter', 'Marcus Webb', 'Kovacs', 'Tyler Okonkwo', 'Whitfield', 'Preethi Nair', and with state 'Todo'. These retrieved Linear ticket data used in the final response.
✗Run #2No Linear tool calls (linear_list_issues, linear_get_issue, or similar) appear anywhere in the trajectory. The agent mentioned Linear tickets in the final response but did not query Linear to retrieve them.
✓Run #3The agent called linear_list_issues three times with queries 'Canopy', 'BrightLoop', and 'Mehta'. The results confirmed Linear tickets for Mehta and Canopy relocations, including Lily Marchetti's open tickets.
✓Run #4The agent called mcp__mcp_d4e7cf9a__linear_list_issues with queries 'Canopy', 'BrightLoop', 'Mehta', 'Simone Richter', and 'Marcus Webb BrightLoop'. Linear ticket data was retrieved, including Mehta tickets #343, #396, and the Marchetti tickets #304-306.
✓Run #5The agent called linear_list_issues multiple times with queries 'Canopy', 'BrightLoop', 'Mehta', 'Simone Richter', 'Marcus Webb', 'Lily Marchetti', and 'Simone'. These returned actual ticket data including Mehta tickets #343, #375, #396 and BrightLoop tickets #322–324.
✓Run #6The agent called linear_list_issues with queries 'Mehta', 'Canopy', and 'BrightLoop', and also called linear_list_projects. The tool responses returned actual Linear ticket data for the Mehta workstreams (tickets #396, #375, #343).
6 The model must use a QuickBooks tool (e.g., quickbooks_search_invoices or quickbooks_search_bills) to find outstanding invoices and financial records.
tool selection
 ✓✓✗✗✓✗ 50%
✓Run #1The agent called quickbooks_search_invoices with CustomerRef 'Canopy' (returned empty), then with no criteria to retrieve all invoices, successfully getting all Canopy and BrightLoop invoices.
✓Run #2The agent called quickbooks_search_invoices twice — once with criteria referencing 'Canopy' and once with null criteria to retrieve all invoices.
✗Run #3No quickbooks_search_invoices, quickbooks_search_bills, or any other QuickBooks tool calls appear in the trajectory. The agent did not query QuickBooks directly for financial records.
✗Run #4No QuickBooks tool calls (quickbooks_search_invoices, quickbooks_search_bills, or similar) appear anywhere in the trajectory. The agent identified invoices through Slack message content (Marcus Thorne's estimate post) rather than querying QuickBooks directly.
✓Run #5The agent called quickbooks_search_invoices with CustomerRef 'Canopy', CustomerRef 'BrightLoop', and then with no filter (to retrieve all invoices). While the targeted CustomerRef queries returned 0 results, the agent recovered with a broader query and later parsed the results via Bash.
✗Run #6No QuickBooks tool calls (quickbooks_search_invoices, quickbooks_search_bills, or similar) appear anywhere in the trajectory. The agent did not query QuickBooks for outstanding invoices or financial records.
7 The model must use a write action tool (e.g., send_email or conversations_add_message) to send messages to Fatimah and Tessa.
tool selection
 ✓✓✓✓✓✓ 100%
✓Run #1The agent used conversations_add_message to send a Slack message to Fatimah in #operations, and send_email to send an email to Tessa Moreno. Both returned success responses.
✓Run #2The agent called conversations_add_message (twice, the second successfully to #operations) for Fatimah and send_email successfully for Tessa.
✓Run #3The agent used conversations_add_message to send a Slack message to Fatimah in #operations (returned ok:true), and used send_email to send to tessa.moreno@brightloopanalytics.com (returned email_id). Both write actions succeeded.
✓Run #4The agent used conversations_add_message to send a Slack message to Fatimah (in #operations) and send_email to send an email to Tessa Moreno. Both write actions were executed successfully.
✓Run #5The agent used conversations_add_message twice (once to Fatimah's DM which failed, then to #operations which succeeded) and send_email to Tessa Moreno (which returned a valid email_id). Both write action tools were invoked.
✓Run #6The agent called conversations_add_message to send a Slack message to Fatimah and send_email to send an email to Tessa Moreno. Both write action tool calls are present in the trajectory.
8 The model must pass [mina.hashimoto@moveops.com](mailto:mina.hashimoto@moveops.com) as the sender and [tessa.moreno@brightloopanalytics.com](mailto:tessa.moreno@brightloopanalytics.com) as the recipient when calling send_email for the BrightLoop update.
query construction
 ✓✓✓✓✓✓ 100%

9 When searching Slack for Fatimah's updates, the model must pass a query related to "Mehta" or "Fatimah" or "Canopy" (or similar) to conversations_search_messages.
query construction
 ✓✓✓✓✓✓ 100%
✓Run #1The agent called conversations_search_messages with search_query 'Mehta' and filter_users_from '@Fatimah', directly targeting Fatimah's updates about Dr. Mehta.
✓Run #2The agent passed search_query 'Mehta', 'Fatimah', 'Canopy Health', and 'Fatimah Mehta chain-of-custody' to conversations_search_messages. All are relevant queries to find Fatimah's updates on Mehta.
✓Run #3The agent passed search queries 'Mehta', 'Canopy Health', and 'Fatimah' to conversations_search_messages, all of which are relevant to finding Fatimah's updates on the Mehta relocation.
✓Run #4The agent searched Slack with queries 'Mehta', 'Fatimah', and 'Canopy Health' — all directly relevant to finding Fatimah's updates on the Dr. Mehta engagement.
✓Run #5The agent called conversations_search_messages with search_query='Mehta', search_query='Fatimah', and search_query='Canopy'. All three are valid query terms relevant to finding Fatimah's Mehta updates.
✓Run #6The agent passed search_query values of 'Mehta', 'Fatimah', and 'Canopy Health' to conversations_search_messages, all of which are relevant queries to surface Fatimah's Mehta updates.
10 When searching for financial data, the model must pass a query or criteria referencing "Canopy" or "BrightLoop" (or similar) to a QuickBooks tool (e.g., quickbooks_search_invoices).
query construction
